title: crotonogyne angustifolia
intro: Crotonogyne angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Crotonogyne angustifolia include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as serving as an antiseptic and astringent. Crotonogyne angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
